news-korea-econ.title: US Submarine strike in the Indian Ocean raises risks for Asia
news-korea-econ.description: The presence of a US submarine conducting lethal operations near friendly nations such as India raises questions about how insulated Asia’s sea lanes are from outside threats

news-global-econ.title: Oil powers to 17% weekly gain as West Asia war rips through the market
news-global-econ.description: As the hostilities have flared, shipping through the Strait of Hormuz has all but halted, choking off oil supplies to global markets and prompting producers to start shutting-in output

news-global-econ.title: Ambani’s record IPO of Jio delayed by regulatory limbo
news-global-econ.description: Ambani said in August that Reliance was aiming to list Jio in the first half of 2026, a plan he had first signaled 2019 — back then with a five-year timeline

news-global-econ.title: Indian refiners are snapping up Russian crude oil after US waiver
news-global-econ.description: Indian refiners are moving quickly to buy Russian oil, with million of barrels floating in Asian waters offering a quick fix to a Middle East supply crunch after the US relaxed restrictions on the trade.

news-global-econ.title: IMF ready to help Economies squeezed by West Asian oil shock
news-global-econ.description: According to IMF Managing Director Kristalina Georgieva, a 10% increase in energy prices lasting a year would raise inflation by 40 basis points and slow growth by up to 0.2%

news-global-econ.title: Morgan Stanley turns more cautious on Asian stocks, cuts India
news-global-econ.description: The strategists downgraded India from overweight to equal-weight in their latest reshuffle, citing the country as one of the Asian markets most exposed to potential Qatari LNG supply disruptions

news-korea-soc.title: US Submarine strike in the Indian Ocean raises risks for Asia
news-korea-soc.description: The presence of a US submarine conducting lethal operations near friendly nations such as India raises questions about how insulated Asia’s sea lanes are from outside threats

news-korea-soc.title: Macron vows nuclear arsenal boost as Europe turns to nukes amid rising global threats
news-korea-soc.description: France expands nuclear arsenal and ends transparency as Europe strengthens defense amid Russia threats. French President Macron declares "to be free, one needs to be feared."

news-korea-soc.title: MAGA hardliner pushes ban on immigration from Islamic countries, US adversaries in wake of Texas shooting
news-korea-soc.description: Rep. Andy Ogles plans to introduce congressional bill banning entry from six Muslim-majority countries, reviving Trump-era travel restrictions.

news-thai-soc.title: American basketball player Jarred Shaw hoping for 'miracle' in Indonesian prison as health crisis worsens
news-thai-soc.description: American basketball player Jarred Shaw faces a health crisis while in an Indonesian prison after his May 2025 cannabis arrest, with the former star battling Crohn's disease.

news-global-soc.description: As the hostilities have flared, shipping through the Strait of Hormuz has all but halted, choking off oil supplies to global markets and prompting producers to start shutting-in output

news-global-soc.title: Gold set for weekly loss as Dollar strength offsets war premium
news-global-soc.description: Bullion rose as much as 1.2% to break above $5,100 an ounce, though was headed for a weekly loss of nearly 3%
